test-method.name: Multilingual
test-method.description: Naviagte to Addbutton form

test-method.name: verifyHindiCaptionSavedAndVisibleForUpdateButton
test-method.description: Verify Hindi caption is saved and displayed correctly for Add Button

test-method.name: verifySaveButtonNameChnageInHindi
test-method.description: Verify Add button name is displayed in Hindi after language change

test-method.name: verifyFormButtonNameRemainsEnglishAfterLanguageChange
test-method.description: Verify form Add button name 'veritical' remains in English after language change

test-method.name: verifyCaptionPropertyIsVisibleForCaptionTestControl
test-method.description: Verify the ' Caption Test' property is visible to users for control 'Add Button' on web form

test-method.name: verifyVisibilityYControlIsVisible

test-method.name: testverifyCaptionShowTest
test-method.description: Verify the behavior of the 'Show Caption' property working correctly when I select show caption as ON.

test-method.name: testVerifyCaptionNotShown
test-method.description: Verify that the behavior of the 'Show Caption' property on the text box when I select DO NOT SHOW option .

test-method.name: testInvalidEmailShowsErrorPopup
test-method.description: Verify that an error message is shown when an invalid email is entered and the form is not submitted.

test-method.name: testValidEmailSubmitsFormSuccessfully
test-method.description: Verify that the form is submitted successfully when a valid email is entered.

test-method.name: testCaptionIsDisplayedOnLeftOfTextbox
test-method.description: Verify that on caption type If I set Left then caption should left on textbox.

test-method.name: testDefaultValueVisible
test-method.description: Verify the behavior of the 'Default Value' property on the Textbox.
